name: yaml-skills
description: Claude/Codex skills for yamlification and deyamlification workflows

interface.shortDescription: Convert markdown into agent-friendly YAML and back again.
interface.longDescription: A Claude/Codex skills pack for yamlification and deyamlification workflows, including lean, minified, max, delta, and markdown reconstruction modes.
defaultPrompt: Yamlify this README into a lean agent context.
Generate a delta YAML from this updated spec.
Deyamlify this agent YAML into a clean markdown doc.
